html:
Cut Reeds are an item obtained by harvesting Reeds that grow in Swamps. Reeds can be refined into Papyrus and are a crafting ingredient for a Blow Dart, Sleep Dart, Fire Dart and Pan Flute. Reeds grow back after 3 days from being picked, but they will not grow in Winter.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, there is an alternative method of obtaining Cut Reeds: by destroying Tumbleweeds. There is a 1% chance of it dropping from the 3 possible drops. Also, a friendly Catcoon can gift the player Cut Reeds.

In the Hamlet DLC, Cut Reeds can only be gathered by using a Boat, as Reeds grow on the water in the Lily Pond Biome.

"cutreeds"
“Cut reeds, ready for crafting and hobbying.”
–Wilson
“Cut reeds, ready for burning. Or maybe crafting.”
–Willow
“I made a clump of reeds.”
–Wolfgang
“I like to cut things up.”
–Wendy
“HOLLOW PLANT MATTER”
–WX-78
“Some rush cuttings.”
–Wickerbottom
“Want to hear my loon call?”
–Woodie
“I think I could build something useful from this.”
–Maxwell
“Pliable yet tough. Very useful. Very useful indeed.”
–Wagstaff
“I cleaned all the bugs öut! Then I ate them.”
–Wigfrid
“Reeds, web, what's the difference.”
–Webber
“It was hard work cutting those. Nap time!”
–Walani
“Smells like greenery.”
–Warly
“But Woodlegs can't reed.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS REEDS”
–Wilba
“Hair cut”
–Wormwood
“Only useful in twos or threes. Or fours or fives.”
–Wheeler
“Doesn't hold a candle to steel pipe.”
–Winona
“One swift yank was all it took.”
–Wortox
“Swamp full of useful things, florp.”
–Wurt
“Ms. Wickerbottom might need some more... reed-ing material.”
–Walter
“I'll put it in my pocket and use it for something later.”
–Wanda
Cut Reeds are an item obtained by harvesting Reeds that grow in Swamps. Reeds can be refined into Papyrus and are a crafting ingredient for a Blow Dart, Sleep Dart, Fire Dart and Pan Flute. Reeds grow back after 3 days from being picked, but they will not grow in Winter.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In the Reign of Giants DLC, there is an alternative method of obtaining Cut Reeds: by destroying Tumbleweeds. There is a 1% chance of it dropping from the 3 possible drops. Also, a friendly Catcoon can gift the player Cut Reeds.
In the Hamlet DLC, Cut Reeds can only be gathered by using a Boat, as Reeds grow on the water in the Lily Pond Biome.

Reeds can be refined into [[Papyrus]] and are a crafting ingredient for a [[Blow Dart]], [[Sleep Dart]], [[Fire Dart]] and [[Pan Flute]]. Reeds grow back after 3 days from being picked, but they will not grow in [[Winter]]. =={{Pic|32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content== In the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, there is an alternative method of obtaining Cut Reeds: by destroying [[Tumbleweed]]s. There is a 1% chance of it dropping from the 3 possible drops. Also, a friendly [[Catcoon]] can gift the player Cut Reeds. In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, Cut Reeds can only be gathered by using a [[Boats|Boat]], as Reeds grow on the water in the [[Lily Pond]] [[Biomes|Biome]]. =={{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item1 = Cut Reeds |count1 = 4 |tool = Science Machine |result = Papyrus}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cut Reeds |count1 = 5 |item2 = Rope |item3 = Mandrake |tool = Prestihatitator |result = Pan Flute}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cut Reeds |count1 = 2 |item2 = Hound's Tooth |item3 = Azure Feather |tool = Science Machine |result = Blow Dart}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cut Reeds |count1 = 2 |item2 = Stinger |item3 = Crow Feather |tool = Science Machine |result = Sleep Dart}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cut Reeds |count1 = 2 |item2 = Charcoal |item3 = Crimson Feather |tool = Science Machine |result = Fire Dart}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cut Reeds |count1 = 2 |item2 = Down Feather |count2 = 5 |item3 = Rope |count3 = 2 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Luxury Fan |dlc = Reign of Giants}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cut Reeds |count1 = 2 |item2 = Doydoy Feather |count2 = 5 |item3 = Rope |count3 = 2 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Tropical Fan |dlc = Shipwrecked}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cut Reeds |count1 = 2 |item2 = Venom Gland |item3 = Crow Feather |tool = Science Machine |result = Poison Dart |dlc = Shipwrecked}} {{Recipe |item1 = Cut Reeds |count1 = 2 |item2 = Iron Ore |count2 = 2 |result = Disarming Tools |dlc = Hamlet}} == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == CD cutreeds.png|Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from [[CD Don't Starve]].
